plan.title: HunyuanDiT Family-Profile Architecture
notes: Tasks are sequential because each changes the authority consumed by the next load or request seam.
Task 8 is a hard SD and SDXL CUDA behavior-preservation gate; Task 9 cannot begin until its review is accepted.
Each task stops for human review before waveplan advances.

T2.title: Add the neutral family registry and open family contracts

T3.title: Emit a portable ResolvedModel and local binding

T4.title: Add family-platform bindings and migrate the factory

T5.title: Publish one active snapshot and enforce resolution epochs

T6.title: Make request admission and ControlNet consume the snapshot

T7.title: Refactor SD workers onto profile data and behavioral hooks

T8.title: Pass the unchanged SD1.5/SD2.x and SDXL CUDA no-op gate

T9.title: Add the lazy HunyuanDiT CUDA worker and dependency preflight

T10.title: Add Canny-first production configuration and live acceptance

T1.1.title: Correct detector architecture facts
T1.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_hunyuandit_detector.py tests/test_worker_factory.py tests/test_model_lifecycle.py -q

T2.1.title: Add the neutral family registry and open family contracts
T2.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_family_profiles.py tests/test_conditioning_contracts.py tests/test_conditioning_registry.py tests/test_conditioning_compel.py -q

T3.1.title: Emit a portable ResolvedModel and local binding
T3.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_model_resolution.py tests/test_worker_pool.py tests/test_model_lifecycle.py -q

T4.1.title: Add family-platform bindings and migrate the factory
T4.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_worker_factory.py tests/test_backend_runtimes.py tests/test_model_routes.py tests/test_cuda_packaging_contract.py -q

T5.1.title: Publish one active snapshot and enforce resolution epochs
T5.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_worker_pool.py tests/test_model_lifecycle.py tests/test_worker_factory.py -q

T6.1.title: Make request admission and ControlNet consume the snapshot
T6.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_ws_routes.py tests/test_backend_runtimes.py tests/test_controlnet_http_contract.py tests/test_controlnet_success_contract.py tests/test_controlnet_execution.py tests/test_controlnet_registry.py tests/test_model_routes.py -q

T7.1.title: Refactor SD workers onto profile data and behavioral hooks
T7.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_cuda_worker_base.py tests/test_cuda_worker_capabilities.py tests/test_cuda_worker_controlnet.py tests/test_conditioning_contracts.py tests/test_conditioning_registry.py tests/test_conditioning_compel.py -q

T8.1.title: Pass the unchanged SD1.5/SD2.x and SDXL CUDA no-op gate
T8.1.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test-cuda python -m pytest tests/test_cuda_worker_base.py tests/test_cuda_worker_capabilities.py tests/test_cuda_worker_controlnet.py tests/test_conditioning_compel.py tests/test_worker_factory.py tests/test_worker_pool.py -q

T9.1.title: Add the lazy HunyuanDiT CUDA worker and dependency preflight
T9.1.command: source /Users/darkbit1001/miniforge3/bin/activate base && python -m pytest tests/test_hunyuandit_worker.py tests/test_worker_factory.py tests/test_cuda_packaging_contract.py tests/test_cuda_worker_controlnet.py -q

T10.1.title: Add Canny-first production configuration and live acceptance
T10.1.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test-cuda python -m pytest tests/test_hunyuandit_acceptance.py -q -m cuda
